name: Wayward Ship
acquisitionSource: Clear Operation: Astral Reign - Ch. 4 - Paradise
descriptionTemplate: Gain 1 Arithmetica, and inflict 5 stacks of {Birth Ritual} on all enemies. If Murphy: Fauxborn is in the team, draw 1 {Waltz of Lemuria}.
lore: The Apostle of the Sea kneels devoutly at the Maiden's feet, offering a kiss of fidelity—she has traveled too far on the wrong course.
